  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
  2. AbstractModel

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.AbstractModel

Packages that use AbstractModel
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi
Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the core domain model for Anahata's context management system.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.huggingface
Provides the provider implementation for the Hugging Face Inference API.
uno.anahata.asi.modal
Provides a pre-configured provider for Modal's GLM-5 inference endpoint.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.config
Provides the configuration and metabolic management components for the Anahata Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.provider
Swing-based providers and models for managing AI model registries.

    Field
    Description

    Agi.selectedModel
    The currently selected model for the agi session.

    Method
    Description

    Agi.getAllModels()
    Gets a flattened list of all models available from all registered providers.

  • Uses of AbstractModel in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider

    Fields in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider with type parameters of type AbstractModel
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private List<? extends AbstractModel>
    AbstractAiProvider.models
    Lazy-loaded cache of models discovered via the provider's API.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider that return types with arguments of type AbstractModel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<? extends AbstractModel>
    AbstractAiProvider.findModel(String modelId)
    Finds a single model by its unique ID within this provider.
    List<? extends AbstractModel>
    AbstractAiProvider.getModels()
    Gets the list of models, using a lazy-loaded cache.
    abstract List<? extends AbstractModel>
    AbstractAiProvider.listModels()
    Fetches the list of all models available from the provider's API.
    List<? extends AbstractModel>
    AbstractAiProvider.refreshModels()
    Clears the local model cache and forces a reload from the API on the next call to AbstractAiProvider.getModels().

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractModel
    Resource.getSelectedModel()
    Convenience method to retrieve the currently selected model from the parent session.

    Description

    AbstractToolParameter.getTokenCount(AbstractModel model)
    Calculates the token count of this parameter on-the-fly using the active model's tokenizer.
